parsed_review.summary: CP00-746 is a clean descriptor-only Korean Legal Depth P07 "Type And Shape Definition" failure-type slice (RP24.P07.M02.S07-S16, 10 units, risk A) that exactly mirrors the validated CP722-745 pattern. Static inspection via Read/Grep/Glob confirms: (1) Implementation is complete and correctly wired — KOREAN_LEGAL_CP746_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:417), KOREAN_LEGAL_CP746_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:3631), case-set/descriptor builders (service.js:105-106,184-186), coverage/descriptor validators (validators.js:88-90), all re-exported via index.js export *. (2) KOREAN_LEGAL_CP745_FAILURE_ROWS.slice(6,16) resolves to exactly the 10 manifest unit titles S07-S16, and deliverable counts {failure_recovery:6,security_audit:1,implementation:1,hermes_evidence:1,fixture:1} match manifest, requirements, and prompt baseline. (3) Tests (model.test.js:57-59) assert coverage errors empty, descriptor validation empty, authority boundaries closed (claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required=true, runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-747, all runtime/HWPX/court/litigation/corporate flags false), and contract projection (latest_pack=CP00-746, validation.valid=true). (4) No-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced in code and asserted: no raw/legal-source/credential/client payloads, no permission-decision detail, no cross-tenant access, no audit-event body, Hermes emits_runtime_receipt=false, Claude packet read_only=true. (5) production_ready and runtime_ready correctly remain false for a descriptor-only pack; the production_ready_flag korean_legal_p07_failure_type_slice_descriptor_verified is supported by the verified descriptor. (6) Contract header, plan live_state, queue live_latest_pack_id, and README CP00-746 are mutually consistent. Hermes control-plane patterns are used only for deterministic review packet/receipt handling, not product runtime. Claude remained a read-only, non-final reviewer. command-evidence.json reports all 25 validation commands at exit 0; these are Codex-reported (I cannot re-run Bash) but are corroborated by my structural review of source, tests, and contract. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
